name: @borjie/knowledge-graph
description: SOTA-2026 Knowledge Graph + GraphRAG + Graph Visualization spec builders for BORJIE — pluggable store ports (in-memory / Kuzu / Neo4j), naive graph embeddings, GraphRAG pipeline (community summary + answerWithKG), bi-temporal facts, PROV-O provenance, real-estate ontology aligned with BOT + RealEstateCore.
